summary: The cmdCronSetup function was already implemented in bin/lib/cron.mjs, printing a crontab entry that cd's to the project root and invokes `agt cron-tick >> .team/cron.log 2>&1`. Added two new tests to verify the cd-to-project-root behavior and the stdout/stderr redirect to cron.log, bringing the cron-tick test suite to 26 passing tests and the full suite to 555 passing.
